    Who We Are

    We Safety Horizon Ventures

    designed Local Dating Arrangement to enable others to have a more personal and successful experience seeking relationships online.

    Is an unprecedented public safety resource that provides the public with access to sex offenders' data nationwide. A partnership between North America, South America, Asia, Australia, Africa, and Europe's Department of Justice and state, territorial, and tribal governments, working together for the safety of everyone. Safety Horizon Ventures provides confidential and independent advice and support for every person who has experienced sexual assault, abuse, or violence, however or whenever it happened.

    Learn More

    Why Choose Us

    Tailored Safety Measures

    Our customized safety protocols ensure that your online dating journey is secure and enjoyable.

    Dedicated Support Team

    Our team is committed to providing dedicated support to address any concerns or issues you may encounter.

    Verified Profiles and Identities

    We implement stringent verification processes to maintain the authenticity of user profiles and identities.

    Expert Guidance and Advice

    Our experienced advisors offer guidance to enhance your safety and confidence in the online dating environment.

    Explore Our Safety Features
